process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: From first contact to compensation payout — 4 simple steps.
process.step1_desc: Call us or fill out the form. We'll review your case within 30 minutes.
process.step2_desc: We gather medical, police, and insurance documentation. You don't have to worry about a thing.
process.step3_desc: We fight the insurer for the highest possible amount. If necessary, we take the case to court.
_review_process.step4_title: legal terminology — 'wypłata odszkodowania' = compensation payout/settlement payment
process.step4_desc: The money goes straight to your account. You only pay our fee from the amount recovered.
_review_social.amount_label: legal terminology — 'uzyskanych odszkodowań' covers both damages and settlements
cases.case1_desc: After an accident on the S7 expressway, the insurer offered 15,000. Our team recovered 8 times more in compensation.
_review_cases.case1_timeline_2: legal terminology — 'odwołanie od decyzji' = appeal/objection against insurer's decision
cases.case1_quote: "I was certain that 15,000 was all I could get. I received 8 times more."
cases.case2_desc: Spinal injury on a construction site. The employer and insurer downplayed the case.
cases.case2_quote: "I didn't believe it was worth fighting. Now I have the money for rehabilitation."
_review_cases.case3_type: legal terminology — 'śmierć bliskiej osoby' = wrongful death / loss of a loved one
cases.case3_desc: A family lost a loved one in an accident. We secured compensation for 3 family members.
_review_cases.case3_desc: legal terminology — 'zadośćuczynienie' (general damages / pain and suffering) vs 'odszkodowanie' (specific damages)
cases.case3_quote: "No amount of money will bring dad back, but thanks to it we could pick ourselves up."
testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Over 500 people we've helped obtain fair compensation.
testimonials.t1_text: "After a car accident I was falling apart. The firm handled everything — from paperwork to negotiations. I received 3 times more than the insurer offered."
testimonials.t2_text: "I had a workplace accident on a construction site. The employer claimed it was my fault. The firm proved the employer's liability and recovered 67 000 zł in compensation."
_review_testimonials.t2_text: legal terminology — 'udowodniła winę pracodawcy' = proved employer's liability/fault
testimonials.t3_text: "The insurer refused to pay after my husband's death. I was devastated. Thanks to the firm, we recovered 310 000 zł for the whole family. An indescribable relief."
testimonials.t3_detail: Death of a loved one, Poznan
testimonials.t4_text: "I came to them after being hit on a pedestrian crossing. The whole process took 3 months, and the compensation amount exceeded my expectations. Professional service."
testimonials.t5_text: "A medical error during knee surgery changed my life. The firm fought for my rights for 5 months and secured compensation that allowed me to get private rehabilitation."
_review_testimonials.t5_text: legal/medical terminology — 'błąd lekarski' could be 'medical error', 'medical negligence', or 'malpractice'
testimonials.t6_text: "A farming accident. The insurer offered a laughable amount. After the firm's intervention, the amount increased more than 5 times. I recommend them to every farmer."
why.title: Why choose us?
why.r1_desc: We charge no upfront fees. We'll review your case and assess your chances at no financial risk to you.
_review_why.r2_title: legal terminology — 'płacisz za sukces' = success fee / contingency fee arrangement
why.r2_desc: Our fee is calculated solely from the compensation recovered. If we don't win, you pay nothing.
why.r3_desc: Lawyers, expert assessors, and mediators with years of experience. Over 500 cases won and 10+ years in the field.
why.r4_desc: Based in Poznan, we serve clients across the country. Everything can be handled remotely or in person.
team.title: Our experts
team.subtitle: A team of experienced lawyers and specialists fighting for your compensation.
_review_team.e1_name: legal terminology — 'Mec.' (Mecenas) = Polish courtesy title for attorneys; 'Radca prawny' = legal counsel
_review_team.e1_role: legal terminology — 'Radca prawny' is a specific type of Polish lawyer distinct from 'Adwokat'
team.e1_desc: Specialisation: road traffic accidents and medical malpractice. 15 years of experience.
_review_team.e2_role: legal terminology — 'Adwokat' = Advocate (a specific type of Polish lawyer, distinct from 'Radca prawny')
team.e2_desc: Specialisation: wrongful death and workplace accidents. 10 years of experience.
_review_team.e3_role: legal terminology — 'biegły rzeczoznawca' = certified/court-appointed expert assessor/valuer
team.e3_desc: Valuation of personal injury and property damage claims. Works with courts across Poland.
team.e4_desc: Your first point of contact and support throughout the entire process. Always available by phone.
insurers.subtitle: We negotiate effectively with the largest insurers in Poland
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How much does the consultation cost?
faq.a1: The consultation is completely free and comes with no obligation. We'll analyse your case and assess your chances of obtaining compensation at no charge whatsoever.
faq.q2: How long does the whole process take?
faq.a2: We resolve most cases within 2–6 months. The timeline depends on the complexity of the case and the insurer's stance. We keep you informed every step of the way.
faq.q3: What if the insurer denied the claim?
faq.a3: An insurer's denial is not the end of the road. They often deny claims without justification, hoping the client will give up. We take on such cases and win them — we have extensive experience in this area.
_review_faq.a3: legal terminology — 'odmowa ubezpieczyciela' = insurer's denial/rejection of claim
faq.a4: We charge no upfront fees. Our remuneration is a commission calculated solely from the compensation obtained. If we don't win, you pay nothing.
_review_faq.q5: legal terminology — 'przedawnienie' = statute of limitations / limitation period
faq.a5: Yes. The standard limitation period is 3 years from the date of the incident, but there are exceptions — for example, criminal cases or claims by minors. That's why it's important to act as soon as possible.
_review_faq.a5: legal terminology — 'termin przedawnienia' = limitation period; 'roszczenia niepełnoletnich' = claims by minors
faq.q6: Do I need to visit the office in person?
faq.a6: No. We can handle the entire process remotely — by phone, email, or video call. We serve clients from all over Poland without the need for in-person visits.
faq.a7: Initially, a description of the incident is enough. We help gather the full documentation — medical, police, and insurance records. We'll tell you exactly what's needed.
cta.title: Been in an accident? Let's talk.
cta.phone_prefix: or call: 61 893 75 04
footer.desc: Professional assistance in obtaining compensation after accidents.
_review_footer.service3: legal/medical terminology — 'błędy medyczne' = medical malpractice / medical errors
_review_footer.service4: legal terminology — could be 'wrongful death claims' in formal legal context

kalkulator.info2_desc: The result is an approximation — the exact amount depends on individual circumstances.
kalkulator.info3_desc: After the estimate, our expert will contact you and assess your case in detail.

kontakt.info_subtitle: We are at your disposal. Call, write, or fill out the form — we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
kontakt.office_value: Poznan — We serve all of Poland

p404.title: We couldn't find this page

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.administrator: Data controller: [Company name], [Address], Poznan, NIP: [to be completed]
_review_privacy.administrator: legal terminology — 'Administrator danych' = Data Controller under GDPR
privacy.s1_text: We collect personal data provided by you in contact forms: first name, phone number, email address (optional), case description, and health information related to your compensation claim.
_review_privacy.s1_text: GDPR terminology — personal data categories including special category health data
privacy.s2_text: We process data for the purpose of: return contact, analysis of the compensation case, performance of the contract, and — with separate consent — marketing contact.
privacy.s3_text: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent), Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract), Art. 9(2)(a) GDPR (health data — explicit consent).
_review_privacy.s3_text: legal terminology — GDPR articles, 'RODO' = GDPR in Polish
privacy.s4_text: We retain data for the period necessary to fulfil the purpose, no longer than 6 years from the conclusion of the case (statute of limitations for claims).
_review_privacy.s4_text: legal terminology — 'okres przedawnienia roszczeń' = statute of limitations for claims
privacy.s5_text: You have the right to: access your data, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, withdrawal of consent at any time, and to lodge a complaint with the President of UODO (Polish Data Protection Authority).
_review_privacy.s5_text: legal terminology — 'Prezes UODO' = President of the Polish Data Protection Authority
privacy.s6_text: Data may be shared with entities cooperating in the provision of services (lawyers, expert assessors, intermediaries) only to the extent necessary for handling the case. We do not sell data to third parties.
privacy.s7_text: The website uses cookies for analytical purposes (Google Analytics 4). Analytical scripts are loaded only after consent is given via the cookie banner. You can withdraw consent at any time by deleting cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.s8_text: For matters concerning personal data, please contact: kancelaria@lexperiens.pl
privacy.disclaimer: Document to be completed and verified by a lawyer.
blog.hero_subtitle: Legal advice, guides for accident victims, and everything you need to know about compensation.
blog.a1_title: What to do after a car accident?
blog.a1_desc: Step by step: from securing the scene to filing a claim. Learn which actions are crucial in the first hours after an accident.
blog.a2_title: Statute of limitations — how much time do you have?
blog.a2_desc: Limitation periods and exceptions you need to know. The standard is 3 years, but in criminal cases up to 20 years — learn the details.
blog.a3_title: The insurer undervalued your claim — what next?
blog.a3_desc: How to appeal the decision and obtain a fair amount. Learn effective ways to challenge an undervalued offer from the insurer.
blog.a4_title: General damages vs. specific damages — what's the difference?
_review_blog.a4_title: legal terminology — 'zadośćuczynienie' (general damages / pain and suffering) vs 'odszkodowanie' (specific / pecuniary damages)
blog.a4_desc: We explain the differences between types of compensation and when you can claim each one.
blog.a5_title: How to document injuries after an accident?
blog.a5_desc: A checklist of documents and examinations that significantly increase your chances of higher compensation. Don't make these mistakes.
blog.a6_desc: How to report an accident to KRUS, what documents to collect, and how to obtain maximum benefits from agricultural insurance.
_review_blog.a6_desc: institutional terminology — 'KRUS' = Agricultural Social Insurance Fund (Polish institution)
blog.cta_title: Have a question about your case?
blog.cta_desc: You don't have to search for answers on your own. We'll analyse your situation for free and answer all your questions.
_review_uslugi.hero_title: legal terminology — 'pomoc odszkodowawcza' = compensation assistance/claims services
uslugi.hero_subtitle: We specialise in all types of compensation cases. Free analysis, fee charged only on success.
uslugi.s1_desc: Compensation after car accidents, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian and cyclist collisions. Insurers undervalue payouts by as much as 80% — we effectively change that.
uslugi.s2_desc: Compensation for injuries sustained at the workplace or while commuting to/from work. Employers and their insurers downplay such cases — we don't let that happen.
_review_uslugi.s2_desc: legal terminology — 'urazy doznane w miejscu pracy lub w drodze do/z pracy' covers both workplace and commuting accidents under Polish law
uslugi.s3_desc: Medical errors, misdiagnosis, post-operative complications, hospital-acquired infections. Difficult cases — but winnable. We work with medical expert witnesses.
_review_uslugi.s3_desc: medical/legal terminology — 'biegli medyczni' = medical expert witnesses
_review_uslugi.s4_title: legal terminology — 'śmierć bliskiej osoby' = wrongful death / loss of a loved one
uslugi.s4_desc: General damages, compensation, and annuity for the family after a tragic death. We ensure the family receives full financial support in the most difficult moment.
_review_uslugi.s4_desc: legal terminology — 'zadośćuczynienie' = general damages (pain and suffering); 'renta' = annuity/pension
uslugi.s5_desc: Compensation for accidents during agricultural work, injuries caused by machinery and tools. Agricultural law has its own specifics that require experience — we have it.
uslugi.s6_desc: Don't see your situation on the list? Every case is different — contact us. We'll assess your chances for free and recommend the best solution.
uslugi.cta_title: Been in an accident? Find out what you're owed.
uslugi.cta_subtitle: Free case analysis. You risk nothing — fee only from compensation won.
sukcesy.hero_subtitle: Real cases, real amounts. See how much we recovered for our clients compared to insurer offers.
sukcesy.case1_full_desc: After an accident on the S7 expressway, the insurer offered just 15,000 zł. Our team of lawyers and expert assessors analysed the case and recovered 8 times more in compensation for the injured party.
sukcesy.case2_full_desc: Spinal injury on a construction site. The employer and insurer downplayed the case, offering a token amount. We recovered compensation for permanent health impairment.
_review_sukcesy.case2_full_desc: legal/medical terminology — 'trwały uszczerbek na zdrowiu' = permanent health impairment
sukcesy.case3_full_desc: A family lost a loved one in a road traffic accident. The insurer offered 40,000. We recovered total general damages for 3 family members.
_review_sukcesy.case3_full_desc: legal terminology — 'zadośćuczynienie' = general damages / pain and suffering
sukcesy.cta_title: Been in an accident? Find out what you're owed.
sukcesy.cta_subtitle: Free case analysis. You risk nothing — fee only from compensation won.
opinie.hero_subtitle: Not just words — results. But words matter too. Here's what people we helped obtain their rightful compensation have to say.
opinie.featured_quote: The insurer offered me 12,000 zł and I thought that was all I'd get. Thanks to this firm I received 95,000 zł. I couldn't believe it was possible — but it is.
opinie.t2_text: "A workplace accident destroyed my spine. The employer claimed it was my fault. The firm fought and won 67,000 zł for me — in 3 months. Professionalism at the highest level."
_review_opinie.t2_text: legal/medical terminology — workplace injury, employer liability
opinie.t3_text: "After a medical error, the hospital refused any responsibility. The firm took the case, gathered documentation, and obtained compensation I never dared dream of. Thank you from the bottom of my heart."
opinie.cta_title: Been in an accident? Find out what you're owed.
opinie.cta_subtitle: Free case analysis. You risk nothing — fee only from compensation won.
jak_dzialamy.hero_subtitle: A transparent 4-step process. From first contact to compensation payout. No hidden costs — fee only on success.
jak_dzialamy.step1_desc: Call, write, or fill out the form on our website — our expert will contact you within 30 minutes during business hours. Tell us about your situation. We'll analyse it during the conversation and tell you honestly whether we have grounds to act.
jak_dzialamy.step1_check1: You don't need to prepare any documents to start
jak_dzialamy.step1_check2: We'll assess your chances during the first call
jak_dzialamy.step1_check3: The consultation is 100% free and without obligation
jak_dzialamy.step2_desc: We gather the necessary documentation from you (medical records, accident report, assessments, invoices). Our legal team analyses the legal basis of the claim, estimates the real value of the damage, and prepares a strategy.
_review_jak_dzialamy.step2_desc: legal terminology — 'protokół wypadku' = accident report; 'orzeczenia' = assessments/rulings; 'podstawy prawne roszczenia' = legal basis of the claim
jak_dzialamy.step2_check1: We tell you what documents you need — and help you obtain them
jak_dzialamy.step2_check2: We estimate the claim value — transparently, without empty promises
jak_dzialamy.step2_check3: We sign a representation agreement — clear terms, fee only on success
_review_jak_dzialamy.step2_check3: legal terminology — 'umowa o reprezentacji' = representation agreement
jak_dzialamy.step3_desc: We conduct tough, evidence-based negotiations with the insurer on your behalf. We rely on court case law, expert opinions, and established practice. We know the methods insurers use to undervalue claims — and we know how to effectively counter them.
_review_jak_dzialamy.step3_desc: legal terminology — 'orzecznictwo sądowe' = court case law; 'opinie biegłych' = expert opinions
jak_dzialamy.step3_check1: We regularly keep you informed about the case status
jak_dzialamy.step3_check2: If needed, we commission independent expert opinions
jak_dzialamy.step3_check3: If negotiations fail — we take the case to court
jak_dzialamy.step4_desc: Once an acceptable compensation amount is obtained, the funds go directly to your account. Only then do we charge our fee — solely from the amount we actually recovered. If we don't win — you pay nothing.
jak_dzialamy.step4_check1: Fee only on success — zero upfront charges
jak_dzialamy.step4_check3: Full support even after the case is closed
jak_dzialamy.why_subtitle: We operate on a success fee model — we earn only when you earn.
komunikacyjne.hero_subtitle: Insurers undervalue payouts by as much as 80%. We help you obtain full compensation after car accidents, motorcycle accidents, and pedestrian collisions.
komunikacyjne.who_text: We specialise in compensation for road traffic accident victims across Poland. We help drivers, passengers, pedestrians, cyclists, and motorcyclists — regardless of who caused the accident.
komunikacyjne.benefit1: General damages for pain and suffering
_review_komunikacyjne.benefit1: legal terminology — 'zadośćuczynienie' = general damages / pain and suffering
komunikacyjne.benefit2: Reimbursement of medical treatment and rehabilitation costs
komunikacyjne.benefit4: Future annuity (in cases of permanent health impairment)
_review_komunikacyjne.benefit4: legal terminology — 'renta na przyszłość' = future annuity; 'trwały uszczerbek' = permanent impairment
komunikacyjne.benefit5: Reimbursement of vehicle repair costs or vehicle value
komunikacyjne.case_desc: After an accident on the S7 expressway, the insurer offered 15,000 zł. Our team negotiated and recovered 8 times more in compensation.
komunikacyjne.faq1_q: Can I claim compensation if I caused the accident myself?
komunikacyjne.faq1_a: If you have a personal accident (NNW) or comprehensive (AC) policy, you may be entitled to compensation even as the at-fault party. Contact us — we'll review your policies.
_review_komunikacyjne.faq1_a: insurance terminology — 'NNW' = personal accident insurance; 'AC' = comprehensive motor insurance (Polish abbreviations)
komunikacyjne.faq2_q: How long do I have to file a claim after an accident?
komunikacyjne.faq2_a: The standard limitation period is 3 years, but in criminal cases it can be as long as 20 years. Don't wait — the sooner you act, the better your chances.
komunikacyjne.cta_title: Been in a road traffic accident?
komunikacyjne.cta_subtitle: We'll analyse your case for free and tell you how much you can recover.
praca.hero_subtitle: Employers and ZUS pay out minimal amounts. We help you obtain full compensation for injuries sustained on construction sites, in factories, offices, and during commutes.
_review_praca.hero_subtitle: institutional terminology — 'ZUS' = Social Insurance Institution (Polish state body)
praca.who_text: We specialise in compensation for workers injured in workplace accidents across Poland. We help victims of injuries on construction sites, in industrial plants, warehouses, and offices, as well as people affected by occupational diseases and commuting accidents.
_review_praca.who_text: legal terminology — 'choroby zawodowe' = occupational diseases; 'wypadki w drodze do i z pracy' = commuting accidents
praca.benefit1: One-off ZUS compensation for permanent health impairment
_review_praca.benefit1: legal/institutional terminology — 'jednorazowe odszkodowanie z ZUS' = one-off compensation from ZUS; 'trwały uszczerbek na zdrowiu' = permanent health impairment
praca.benefit2: General damages for pain and suffering from the employer
praca.benefit3: Reimbursement of medical treatment and rehabilitation costs
praca.benefit5: Equalisation annuity for long-term incapacity for work
praca.case_desc: A construction worker with a spinal injury received only 8,000 zł from ZUS. After pursuing claims against the employer, our team recovered 8.4 times more in total compensation.
praca.faq1_q: Can my employer fire me for filing a claim?
praca.faq1_a: No — labour law prohibits termination in retaliation for pursuing compensation. If your employer dismisses you after filing a claim, you can additionally seek damages for unlawful termination of employment.
_review_praca.faq1_a: legal terminology — 'rozwiązanie stosunku pracy' = termination of employment
praca.faq2_q: What if my employer violated health and safety regulations?
praca.faq2_a: An employer's violation of health and safety (BHP) regulations significantly strengthens your position. You can pursue supplementary compensation beyond ZUS benefits — we recover the highest amounts in such cases.
_review_praca.faq2_a: legal terminology — 'przepisy BHP' = health and safety regulations; 'odszkodowanie uzupełniające' = supplementary compensation
praca.cta_title: Were you injured in a workplace accident?
praca.cta_subtitle: We'll analyse your case for free and tell you how much you can recover.
medyczne.hero_subtitle: Hospitals and medical insurers minimise their payouts. We help you obtain full compensation for misdiagnosis, hospital-acquired infections, and surgical errors.
medyczne.who_text: We specialise in medical malpractice compensation cases across Poland. We help patients harmed by misdiagnosis, improperly performed procedures and surgeries, hospital-acquired infections (including MRSA and sepsis), and inappropriate pharmacological treatment.
medyczne.benefit1: General damages for pain, suffering, and reduced quality of life
medyczne.benefit2: Reimbursement of additional treatment and rehabilitation costs
medyczne.benefit3: Compensation for lost wages during treatment
medyczne.benefit4: Future annuity for permanent health impairment
medyczne.case_desc: A patient infected with staphylococcus in hospital received a settlement offer of 12,000 zł. Our team proved the facility's negligence and recovered 7.9 times more in compensation.
medyczne.faq1_q: How do you prove a doctor made an error?
medyczne.faq1_a: In medical malpractice cases, medical records and an expert medical opinion are key. Our team works with specialists from various medical fields who assess whether the staff's conduct complied with medical standards. We handle all documentation — you don't have to do it yourself.
_review_medyczne.faq1_a: legal/medical terminology — 'sztuka lekarska' = medical standards / standard of care
medyczne.faq2_q: How long do I have to claim compensation for medical malpractice?
medyczne.faq2_a: The limitation period in medical cases is generally 3 years from the date the injured party learned of the harm and the person liable for redress. For tortious acts constituting a criminal offence, the period is 20 years. Don't delay — contact us as soon as possible.
_review_medyczne.faq2_a: legal terminology — 'czyn niedozwolony będący przestępstwem' = tortious act constituting a criminal offence
medyczne.cta_title: Have you suffered due to medical malpractice?
medyczne.cta_subtitle: We'll analyse your case for free and tell you how much you can recover.
smierc.breadcrumb_current: Compensation after the death of a loved one
smierc.hero_title: Compensation after the death of a loved one
smierc.hero_subtitle: Losing a loved one is a pain no sum of money can replace. But the victim's family has the right to fair compensation. We'll help you obtain it — without unnecessary formalities and with full respect for your situation.
smierc.who_text: After the death of a loved one due to an accident or medical error, the right to compensation and general damages belongs to the closest family members: spouse, children, parents, siblings, and in some cases also more distant relatives or persons who were effectively close. You don't need to be formally related to apply for benefits.
_review_smierc.who_text: legal terminology — 'zadośćuczynienie' = general damages; 'osoby faktycznie bliskie' = persons effectively close (a concept recognised by Polish courts)
smierc.benefit1: General damages for pain and suffering after the loss of a loved one (Art. 446 § 4 of the Civil Code)
_review_smierc.benefit1: legal terminology — 'art. 446 § 4 k.c.' = Article 446 § 4 of the Polish Civil Code
smierc.benefit2: Compensation for significant deterioration of life circumstances (Art. 446 § 3 of the Civil Code)
smierc.benefit3: Reimbursement of medical treatment and funeral costs
smierc.benefit4: Maintenance annuity for eligible persons (children, spouse)
smierc.benefit5: Reimbursement of the family's lost income
smierc.process_title: How do we handle wrongful death cases?
smierc.process_text: We know that formalities are especially burdensome at such a difficult time. That's why we take on the entire administrative burden — from gathering documentation, through contact with the insurer, to negotiations and any court proceedings. You can focus on yourself and your family.
smierc.case_desc: A family tragically lost their father in a road accident. The insurer offered 40,000 zł for the wife and two children. Our team negotiated and recovered 7.8 times more, including an annuity for the children until they reach adulthood.
smierc.faq1_q: Who can file a compensation claim after the death of a loved one?
smierc.faq1_a: The right to compensation belongs to the closest family: spouse, children, parents, and in justified cases siblings and other close persons. Courts increasingly recognise the rights of persons who were effectively close, even without formal family ties. It's worth consulting your individual situation — we'll analyse your entitlements for free.
smierc.faq2_q: How is the amount of general damages calculated?
_review_smierc.faq2_q: legal terminology — 'zadośćuczynienie' = general damages (pain and suffering)
smierc.faq2_a: The amount of general damages depends on many factors: the strength of emotional bonds, the deceased's role in the family, the impact of the loss on daily life, any psychological effects (depression, PTSD), and current court case law. Insurers systematically undervalue these amounts — our team ensures the claim reflects the real harm suffered.
smierc.cta_title: Have you lost a loved one due to someone else's actions?
smierc.cta_subtitle: We'll analyse your case discreetly and for free, and tell you how much you and your family can recover.
rolnicze.hero_subtitle: Accidents involving agricultural machinery, livestock, or fieldwork are among the most common causes of serious injuries. KRUS and insurers systematically undervalue payouts — we help farmers obtain full compensation.
_review_rolnicze.hero_subtitle: institutional terminology — 'KRUS' = Agricultural Social Insurance Fund
rolnicze.who_text: We specialise in agricultural cases across Poland. We help individual farmers, employees working on farms, and families of the injured. We handle both KRUS claims and claims from the mandatory farmer's third-party liability (OC) insurance.
_review_rolnicze.who_text: legal/institutional terminology — 'OC rolnika' = farmer's mandatory third-party liability insurance
rolnicze.cause1: Accidents involving tractors and agricultural machinery (combines, mowers, balers)
rolnicze.cause3: Falls from height (barn roofs, silos, trailers)
rolnicze.benefit1: One-off KRUS compensation for permanent health impairment
rolnicze.benefit2: General damages for pain and suffering from the farmer's OC insurance
rolnicze.benefit3: Reimbursement of medical treatment and rehabilitation costs
rolnicze.benefit5: Agricultural annuity from KRUS for permanent incapacity for work
rolnicze.case_desc: A farmer from Wielkopolska suffered a serious leg injury while operating a tractor. KRUS paid a one-off 10,000 zł. Our team pursued additional compensation from the farmer's OC insurance — in total we recovered 8.5 times more than the initial offer.
rolnicze.faq1_q: Does KRUS cover all workers on a farm?
rolnicze.faq1_a: KRUS covers farmers conducting agricultural activity and household members. Hired employees on employment contracts are covered by ZUS. However, regardless of the insurance system, an injured person can pursue claims from the OC insurance of the farmer who caused the accident. We'll check which benefits you're entitled to — for free.
rolnicze.faq2_q: How long do I have to report an agricultural accident?
rolnicze.faq2_a: The accident must be reported to KRUS without delay — no later than 6 months from the event to preserve the right to one-off compensation. Civil claims from the farmer's OC insurance are time-barred after 3 years from the date the injured party learned of the harm and the liable person. Don't delay — the sooner you act, the better.
rolnicze.cta_title: Had an accident on a farm?
rolnicze.cta_subtitle: We'll analyse your case for free and check how much you can recover from KRUS and the farmer's OC insurance.

kom.hero_title: Were you injured in a road accident?
kom.hero_desc: Insurers underpay claims by up to 80%. We help you recover full compensation after car accidents, motorcycle crashes, and pedestrian incidents — for drivers, passengers, pedestrians, cyclists, and motorcyclists, regardless of who caused the accident.
kom.benefit2: Reimbursement of medical and rehabilitation costs
kom.benefit4: Future annuity (in cases of permanent disability)
kom.benefit5: Vehicle repair costs or total loss value
kom.case_desc: After a collision on the S7 motorway, the insurer offered PLN 15,000. Our team negotiated and secured an award eight times higher.
kom.faq1_q: Can I claim compensation if I caused the accident?
kom.faq1_a: If you hold a personal accident (NNW) or comprehensive (AC) policy, you may still be entitled to compensation even as the at-fault driver. Contact us — we will review your policies free of charge.
kom.faq2_q: How long do I have to file a claim after an accident?
kom.faq2_a: The standard limitation period is 3 years, but in criminal cases it can extend to 20 years. Do not delay — the sooner you act, the stronger your position.
kom.cta_desc: Free consultation, fees only on success. We call back within 30 minutes.
kom.contact_desc: We will assess your situation free of charge.
kom.form_phone_error: Please enter a valid phone number
kom.form_email_error: Please enter a valid email address
kom.form_consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data. Privacy Policy *
kom.form_success_desc: We will be in touch shortly.
praca.hero_desc: Employers and ZUS pay minimal amounts. We help you obtain full compensation for injuries on construction sites, in factories, offices and during commutes. We assist victims of injuries in industrial plants, warehouses and offices, as well as people affected by occupational diseases.
praca.benefit1: One-time ZUS compensation for permanent health impairment
praca.benefit2: Compensation for pain and suffering from the employer
praca.benefit3: Reimbursement of treatment and rehabilitation costs
praca.benefit5: Equalisation pension for long-term incapacity to work
praca.case_title: Spinal injury on a construction site
praca.case_desc: A construction worker with a spinal injury received only PLN 8,000 from ZUS. After pursuing claims against the employer, our team secured a total of 8.4 times more compensation.
praca.faq1_q: Can my employer fire me for filing a claim?
praca.faq1_a: No — labour law prohibits terminating a contract in retaliation for pursuing compensation. If your employer dismisses you after filing a claim, you can additionally seek compensation for unlawful termination of employment.
praca.faq2_q: What if my employer violated health and safety regulations?
praca.faq2_a: An employer's breach of health and safety regulations significantly strengthens your position. You can pursue supplementary compensation beyond ZUS benefits — these cases achieve the highest awards.
praca.cta_desc: Free consultation, commission only on success. We call back within 30 minutes.
praca.contact_desc: We will analyse your situation free of charge.
praca.form_consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data. Privacy policy *
praca.form_success_desc: We will be in touch shortly.
med.hero_desc: Hospitals and medical insurers minimise their payouts. We help you obtain full compensation for misdiagnosis, hospital-acquired infections and surgical errors, including improperly performed procedures and inappropriate drug treatment.
med.benefit1: Compensation for pain, suffering and reduced quality of life
med.benefit2: Reimbursement of additional treatment and rehabilitation costs
med.benefit3: Compensation for lost earnings during treatment
med.benefit4: Future pension for permanent health damage
med.case_desc: A patient infected with staphylococcus in hospital was offered a settlement of PLN 12,000. Our team proved the facility's negligence and secured 7.9× higher compensation.
med.faq1_q: How do you prove that a doctor made an error?
med.faq1_a: In medical malpractice cases, medical records and an expert physician's opinion are key. Our team works with specialists across medical disciplines who assess whether staff conduct met the standard of care. We handle the gathering of documentation — you don't have to do it yourself.
med.faq2_q: How long do I have to pursue compensation for medical malpractice?
med.faq2_a: The limitation period in medical cases is generally 3 years from the date the injured party learned of the damage and the person liable for it. Where the tort constitutes a criminal offence the period is 20 years. Don't delay — contact us as soon as possible.
med.cta_mid_desc: Free consultation, commission only on success. We call back within 30 minutes.
med.contact_desc: We will analyse your situation free of charge.
med.form_consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data. Privacy policy *
med.form_success_desc: We will be in touch shortly.
smierc.hero_label: Compensation after death of a loved one
smierc.hero_title: Did you lose a loved one in an accident?
smierc.hero_desc: The loss of a loved one is a pain no sum can replace. But the victim's family has the right to fair compensation. We will help you obtain it — without unnecessary formalities and with full respect for your situation.
smierc.who_desc: After the death of a loved one due to an accident or medical error, the right to compensation belongs to the closest family members: spouse, children, parents, siblings, and in some cases more distant relatives or factually close persons. You do not need to be formally related to apply for a benefit.
smierc.benefit1: Compensation for pain and suffering after loss of a loved one (art. 446 § 4 CC)
smierc.benefit2: Compensation for significant deterioration of life situation (art. 446 § 3 CC)
smierc.benefit3: Reimbursement of medical and funeral costs
smierc.benefit4: Maintenance pension for entitled persons (children, spouse)
smierc.benefit5: Recovery of the family's lost income
smierc.process_title: How do we handle a case involving the death of a loved one?
smierc.process_desc: We know that at such a difficult time, formalities are especially burdensome. That is why we take on the entire administrative burden — from gathering documentation, through contact with the insurer, to negotiations and possible court proceedings. You can focus on yourself and your family.
smierc.case_title: Death of a father in a road accident
smierc.case_desc: A family tragically lost their father in a road accident. The insurer offered PLN 40,000 for the wife and two children. Our team conducted negotiations and obtained compensation 7.8 times higher, including a pension for the children until adulthood.
smierc.faq1_q: Who can file a compensation claim after the death of a loved one?
smierc.faq1_a: The right to compensation belongs to the closest family: spouse, children, parents, and in justified cases siblings and other close persons. Courts increasingly recognise the rights of factually close persons, even without formal family ties. It is worth consulting your individual situation — we will analyse your entitlements free of charge.
smierc.faq2_q: How is the amount of compensation calculated?
smierc.faq2_a: The amount of compensation depends on many factors: the strength of emotional bonds, the role of the deceased in the family, the impact of the loss on the daily life of relatives, any psychological effects (depression, PTSD), and current court rulings. Insurers systematically undervalue these amounts — our team ensures that the claim reflects the actual harm suffered.
smierc.cta_desc: Free consultation, commission only on success. We will call you back within 30 minutes.
smierc.contact_desc: We will analyse your case free of charge.
smierc.form_consent: I consent to the processing of personal data. Privacy policy *
smierc.form_success_desc: We will be in touch soon.
rol.hero_desc: Accidents involving farm machinery, livestock, or field work are among the most common causes of serious injury. KRUS and insurers routinely undervalue payouts — we help farmers secure full compensation.
rol.who_desc: We specialise in agricultural cases across Poland. We assist individual farmers, employees working on farms, and families of the injured. We handle both KRUS claims and mandatory farmers' third-party liability (OC) claims.
rol.cause1: Accidents involving tractors and farm machinery (combines, mowers, balers)
rol.cause3: Falls from height (barn roofs, silos, trailers)
rol.cause4: Accidents during field and horticultural work
rol.benefit1: Lump-sum KRUS compensation for permanent health impairment
rol.benefit2: Damages for pain and suffering from the farmer's OC liability insurer
rol.benefit3: Reimbursement of medical and rehabilitation costs
rol.benefit5: Agricultural pension from KRUS for permanent incapacity to work
rol.case_desc: A farmer from Wielkopolska suffered a serious leg injury while operating a tractor. KRUS paid a one-off 10,000 zł. Our team pursued additional compensation from the farmer's OC insurer — we recovered 8.5× more than the original offer in total.
rol.faq1_q: Does KRUS cover all workers on a farm?
rol.faq1_a: KRUS insures farmers running agricultural activities and their household members. Employees hired under an employment contract on a farm fall under ZUS. However, regardless of the insurance system, a victim may pursue claims from the farmer's OC liability — the insurer of the person at fault. We will check free of charge what benefits you are entitled to.
rol.faq2_q: How long do I have to report an agricultural accident?
rol.faq2_a: The accident must be reported to KRUS without delay — no later than 6 months from the event to preserve the right to a lump-sum payment. Civil claims against the farmer's OC insurer become time-barred 3 years from the day the victim learned of the damage and the liable party. Don't wait — the sooner you act, the better.
